title: The Simpsons (Arcade)
rom_notes: Full 4-player World version (simpsons.zip). 14 ROM files, 7.2MB uncompressed. Also have simpsons2pj.zip (2P Japan) as fallback.
description: Co-op beat-em-up arcade survival — track lives and score. Konami classic.

p1_lives.notes: FBNeo arcade RAM. Confidence: medium — address sourced from MAME/FBNeo memory map research. Needs live verification.

p2_lives.notes: P2 lives — estimated +8 byte offset from P1. Needs live verification.

p1_health.notes: P1 health bar. Needs live verification with RetroArch memory viewer.

credits.notes: Credit counter — standard Konami arcade offset.

tournament_rules: 2-player co-op. Track who survives furthest through stages. Credit-limited run (set credits to 3 at start). Tiebreaker: score.
notes: RAM addresses are estimated — Konami arcade hardware layout. MUST verify with RetroArch memory viewer before using in production. The hi-score file (simpsons2pj.nv) suggests FBNeo runs this correctly.
sources: libretro-database hi-score file confirms ROM runs in FBNeo
name: The Simpsons (Arcade)
